findings.note: DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for mints/get and mints/get-mintid; Hidden:true so it isn't user-facing — its real subcommands carry agent-grade descriptions; generator-template fix tracked as retro candidate

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper for coin types (types/get, types/search, types/issues, types/batch, types/series); helps category but agents call the leaf subcommands which are described; retro candidate for richer parent Short in generator

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper nested under types for coin issues (types issues get, types issues get-prices); leaf subcommands carry descriptive Shorts — agents bind tools to the leaves, not this category container

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper nested under users for personal collection items (5 subcommands: add, delete, edit, get, get-users); subcommands describe the specific mutation/read action — this entry is a navigation node, not a callable action

DO-NOT-EDIT generated parent grouper nested under users for personal collections (get-user plus hydrate workflow); the hydrate transcendence command at this path carries its own rich Short; container itself never invoked as a leaf tool
